{{#widget:Tweet|id=980671434153275393}}

* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yang_Chen-Ning C. N. Yang on Wikipedia]
* [http://www.math.stonybrook.edu/events/simons/general.html XIII Geometry Festival (Stony Brook)]

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Mathematics]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
